commands.review_summary:
This PR extracts provider/model catalog normalization and configured model-ref helpers into a private `@openclaw/model-catalog-core` workspace package while preserving existing facades and updating build, CI, and type-generation inputs.

PR surface: Source +39, Tests +109, Config +52, Other +27. Total +227 across 21 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is an internal refactor PR rather than a bug report with a failing user path. The relevant verification is package-boundary, build, and model catalog regression proof on the mergeable head.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer handling, dependency graph approval, and dirty merge resolution are required; there is no narrow automated code repair to queue from this review.

target.title: refactor: extract model catalog core package
target.body:
## Summary

- Extract model/provider catalog helpers into private workspace package `@openclaw/model-catalog-core`.
- Keep existing `src/agents`, `src/config`, `src/plugin-sdk`, and `src/shared` entrypoints as facades over the package-owned implementation.
- Move provider model-id tests into the package and add package-local coverage for configured model refs, manifest policy normalization, and malformed array-shaped records.
- Add the package to tsconfig paths, build outputs, plugin SDK d.ts generation, CI cache inputs, and the workspace lockfile.

## Verification

- `pnpm test packages/model-catalog-core/src/configured-model-refs.test.ts packages/model-catalog-core/src/provider-model-id-normalize.test.ts packages/model-catalog-core/src/provider-model-id-normalization.test.ts src/plugins/manifest-model-id-normalization.test.ts src/config/config.model-ref-validation.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm run test:extensions:package-boundary:compile`
- `pnpm build`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Auto Review

- First run accepted one finding: the extracted `isRecord` helper allowed arrays, unlike the old shared guard.
- Fixed by preserving `!Array.isArray(value)` and adding a regression test for array-shaped malformed model records.
- Final run: `autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`.

Behavior addressed: internal model catalog normalization/configured-ref helpers now live in `@openclaw/model-catalog-core` without changing provider runtime behavior.

Real environment tested: local source checkout on branch `refactor/extract-model-catalog-core`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused package/config/plugin tests, extension package-boundary compile, full `pnpm build`, `git diff --check`, and local autoreview.

Evidence after fix: focused tests passed 3 Vitest shards with 21 tests; extension package boundary check compiled 110 plugins; full build completed with plugin SDK exports verified; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

Observed result after fix: existing model/provider normalization entrypoints continue to compile through facades, the new package emits dist artifacts, and malformed array-shaped model records are ignored as before.

What was not tested: live provider catalog fetches or live agent/provider calls.
target.author: steipete
